title: Context Management
description: Master the art of feeding agents the right information at the right time

lessons.title: The Context Challenge
lessons.description: Why context is the number one bottleneck for agent performance

lessons.title: Context Files and Kits
lessons.description: Using .ctx files, context packs, and structured context delivery for agents

lessons.title: Memory and Persistence
lessons.description: Persistent memory systems that carry context across agent sessions

lessons.description: Techniques for maximizing what agents can accomplish within a finite context window

lessons.title: Context at Scale
lessons.description: Managing context in large codebases with thousands of files and multiple teams
